name: Sword Art Online - Aincrad [RPG]
description:
UPDATE: This is now an old version of my SAO RPG bot.

On November 6, 2022, the first and most anticipated VRMMORPG was launched: Sword Art Online (SAO), for a new technology known as NerveGear, developed by SAO’s own creator, Akihiko Kayaba.

What you didn’t expect was that this game was actually a deadly trap, designed to imprison all 10,000 players inside a 100-floor castle — Aincrad — where the NerveGear device would fry the brain of anyone who died in the game or had their headset forcibly removed from the outside. The only way out? Don't worry: just defeat every boss on all 100 floors of the castle and clear the game... or die trying.

. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .

Welcome to the world of Sword Art Online!

Hell yeah, so now I'm fully back with a complete rework of my own RPG bot. I've fixed every single issue I've seen with the last one and also remade my entire prompt to keep it smooth and oriented to a slow-burn scenario. This, might be my best creation (I hope).

As always, this BOT is specifically made for Deepseek. So don’t blame me if you try to use it with JanitorAI’s native model and it explodes. Models with more than 100k context tokens are better anyway, especially if you're aiming for a proper RPG experience.

((All characters are adults! Only a few canon characters have been added, but fair warning: Kirito does NOT exist in this context! Have fun.))

. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .

If you'd like any changes, make sure to leave a review.
And that's all... for now.
creator: CoysmerOf
